creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I do not think this classifies as a legitimate Problem Record. 
Let us first investigate what is going on, you can do so by 
sending the message to questions@FreeBSD.org and ask them what 
steps you can take to resolve this. In any case you need to 
provide more details about your hardware, and possibly try 8.0-RC2 
to see whether that works or not. Thanks.
